role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of linguistic cues (no signs) and stayed within domain.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and climate cues as declared.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed vegetation types (montane forest, grasslands) consistent with the domain.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road markings, signs, and infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Used cross-domain knowledge (camera generation, utility pole styles) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the Andean region (South America) but failed to distinguish Peru from Colombia. The agents relied heavily on generic Andean features (lushness, steepness) and meta-cues (camera quality) that were not specific enough to rule out Peru, leading to a confident but incorrect final prediction.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of lush, steep, green terrain match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of tropical montane vegetation match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of the yellow diamond sign and road markings match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Descriptions of the camera blur and utility poles match the image.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: Peru was not in the candidate pool for the final tournament (Colombia vs Ecuador). The agents failed to include Peru in their initial assessments.
